DavidIlie/plexo: A self-hosted dashboard that lets you browse your Plex movies, shows, watch history and viewing trends in one tidy interface.
DavidIlie/home-cluster: Turn spare hardware into a reliable, easy-to-operate home server cluster with sensible defaults and automated ops.
DavidIlie/personal-dashboard: A compact self-hosted dashboard that surfaces and controls all your personal services in one place.
DavidIlie/tcl-home-ac: Hook your TCL air conditioner into Home Assistant so you can monitor and control it even without official support.
DavidIlie/ilo4-fan-controller: Take control of fan speeds on modded iLO4 servers to keep temperatures down and the noise tolerable.
DavidIlie/tuya-smart-ir-ac: Make Tuya IR air conditioners controllable from Home Assistant so you can automate and remote-control them like any other smart device.
DavidIlie/davidilie.com: My personal site and portfolio showcasing projects, posts, and contact details in one place.
DavidIlie/sharex-upload-server: Run your own fast, privacy-first ShareX upload server for screenshots and files.
DavidIlie/laundrey: Track items handed into the laundry so nothing gets lost or mixed up.
DavidIlie/reddam-pokemon-go: A kid-friendly location game inspired by Pokémon Go that helps students explore and learn about their school.
